summary: Family members of Blake Zieto, killed in 2006 by an illegal-alien hit-and-run driver, give an emotional testimonial against a black backdrop holding the victim's photo and 'Justice for Blake' buttons, with one cutaway to a memorial mantel of family photos. It is a sober victim-advocacy appeal urging tips on the suspect, driven entirely by spoken testimony. Not music-driven, not a genre experiment or youth-appeal spectacle, so out of scope.
